videos.title: Didn't expect an iPad keyboard to look this good at night
videos.description:
The Edge Pro by Typecase — per-key RGB backlight, precision glass trackpad, and only 3.98mm thin. Built for iPad Pro 11-inch M5 and M4.

videos.title: POV: You finally stopped typing on glass⌨️✨
videos.description:
Say goodbye to the worst part of owning an iPad. 🙄 Buying this was the best decision I’ve made all year. 

The Typecase Edge Pro completely transforms the iPad experience with a magnetic per-key RGB keyboard, and seamless productivity. Whether you're typing, binging shows, or drawing, this is the ultimate setup. 

🔥 Upgrade your iPad setup here: typecase.co

videos.title: Typecase Edge Pro — Per-Key RGB iPad Keyboard
videos.description:
You work after dark. Your setup should show it.

Edge Pro — the world's first per-key RGB iPad keyboard.
Every key lights up independently. 3.98mm CNC aluminum body,
thinner than Magic Keyboard. Full-surface glass trackpad.
16.8 million colors. Built for iPad Pro & iPad Air.

The RGB iPad keyboard Magic Keyboard will never be.

Shop Edge Pro → https://typecase.co/collections/edge-pro
